description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:4.2.2 Docker image. Define a single job named pages (default stage) that runs only on the master branch, caches the node_modules/ directory, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. In the script, run npm install hexo-cli -g, then npm install, then hexo deploy. The job should collect the public folder as an artifact and no additional services or variables are required.
